name: io.github.timwal78/squeezeos
title: SqueezeOS — Institutional Market Intelligence
description: 33 MCP tools for institutional-grade equity intelligence: squeeze scanner, options flow analysis, IWM 0DTE scoring, AI council verdicts (multi-engine consensus), FTD registry, peer signal marketplace, conditional escrow contracts, and signal prediction markets. 28 free tools included. Premium tools pay-per-call via x402 micropayment standard — agents pay RLUSD on XRPL or USDC on Base, receive a 1-hour signed JWT. No API keys or subscriptions required.

headers.name: X-Payment-Token
headers.description: JWT payment token required for premium tools only. Obtain via: call get_invoice with the endpoint_id → pay RLUSD on XRPL or USDC on Base → call verify_payment with the tx_hash. Token valid 1 hour. Free tools work without this header.
